riskItems.description: Every risk entry, so a downstream document can cite RISK-xxx structurally rather than extracting the identifier from prose.
riskItems.schema: array<{ id: string, title: string, subsystem: string, owner: string, score: int, status: string }>

criteria.criterion: PASS if every risk in the output has a unique identifier with no duplicates. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if every score, likelihood, and impact in the output traces to the retrieved data or SQL results. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if every risk has title, description, subsystem, owner, likelihood, impact, score, and status. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if every risk in the output is supported by the retrieved sources. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if the output is written unambiguously. FAIL otherwise.

trajectory.description: Provenance checks against the recorded retrieval trajectory.

required.reason: A risk register's scoring scales are defined by the controlled risk-management procedure; without it the scores are ungoverned.
